productDisplayName: Fila Men's Leonard White Black Shoe
description: With a soft footbed and a lace up front, these shoes are assured to support your exercise regime as well as look great when  on outings with friends.Upper Synthetic upper with lace-up front Padded tongue for soft feel Padded sockliner for snug Fit and shock absorption Rubber heel counter embedded in the upper for added durability Perforations around the toe box for breathability of feet Midsole Lightweight EVA midsole for enhanced shock absorption Soft footbed for an ergonomic fit Outsole Carbon rubber outsole with rib pattern below the toe area for flexible 180 degree movement Ridges below the heel counter for firm placement on the ground Wash careDo not machine washRub with soft cloth to clear off dust and dirt
